title: colysis axillaris
intro: Colysis axillaris, also known as the 'Axillary Colysis', is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Colysis axillaris include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
